name: Apple-Oatmeal Chewies
recipeIngredient: 1 large Golden Delicious apple (peeled and diced)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease a 13" x 9" baking pan.
2. In a large bowl, measure the first 8 ingredients and add 1/2 teaspoon salt. With the mixer on low speed, beat the ingredients until well blended, scraping the bowl occasionally with a rubber spatula.
3. Fold in the oats, walnuts, and apple. Spread the dough evenly in the prepared pan.
4. Bake for 35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
5. Cool the bars on a wire rack. Cut lengthwise into 4 strips, then cut each strip crosswise into 5 pieces. Store the bars in a tightly covered container.
